nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: POST {id, action: 'confirm'|'reject', reason?}. Only Fabian uses this.

nodes.name: Update Gate Log

parameters.query: UPDATE confidence_gate_log SET status = CASE WHEN $1 = 'confirm' THEN 'CONFIRMED' ELSE 'REJECTED' END, reviewed_at = NOW(), reviewed_by = 'fabian', rejection_reason = $2 WHERE id = $3 AND status = 'PROPOSED' RETURNING id, register_name, status;

nodes.notes: Only updates PROPOSED items. Cannot re-review CONFIRMED/REJECTED items.

nodes.name: Write to Google Sheet (if confirmed)
nodes.notes: Only write to the register sheet if Fabian confirmed the item.

nodes.name: Append to Register Sheet
nodes.notes: Appends the confirmed row to the appropriate register tab in Google Sheets.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO event_log (event_type, entity_type, source, metadata) VALUES ($1, 'gate_item', 'confidence_gate', jsonb_build_object('gate_log_id', $2, 'register', $3, 'action', $4));

meta.description: POST /webhook/gate-action — Fabian confirms or rejects PROPOSED items. Confirmed items are written to Google Sheets. Rejected items are logged with reason. No automation may call this endpoint.
